title: Hook convention and post-install execution
body: Document hook declaration convention (hook paths, env vars, contracts). After install.sh completes, check for $VENDOR_INSTALL_DIR/hooks/post-install.sh. Run it if .git/ exists in consumer repo. Write version stamp to .vendored/manifests/<vendor>.post-installed. Set VENDOR_NAME, VENDOR_PKG_DIR, PROJECT_DIR env vars.

title: --list and --hooks query commands
body: Add --list flag to coordinator: scan .vendored/manifests/, topological sort, output vendor names one per line. Add --hooks <start|resume> flag: map hook type to filename (session-start.sh / session-resume.sh), filter to vendors that have the file, output absolute paths in dependency order. Tests for both commands.
